mapper.insert: BEGIN INSERT INTO TRIP ( MEMBER_ID, NAME, START_DATE, END_DATE, CREATE_DATE, LATEST_DATE, STATUS ) VALUES ( #{memberId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), NULL, 'ACTIVE' ) RETURNING TRIP_ID INTO #{tripId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}; END;
